TIAMAT-SEA_OF_LIFE_WOMB.title: Womb of the Sea of Life
TIAMAT-SEA_OF_LIFE_WOMB.description: #At the start of each combat, enter Femme Fatale form and spawn 1 Laḫmu.
TIAMAT-SEA_OF_LIFE_WOMB.flavor: From the discarded womb of Genesis, life still pours — endless, unasked-for, and hers.
TIAMAT-MOTHERS_TEARS.title: Mother's Tears
TIAMAT-MOTHERS_TEARS.description: #Whenever you Devour Laḫmu, heal 2 HP for each Laḫmu devoured.
TIAMAT-MOTHERS_TEARS.flavor: She weeps for every child she consumes — and that grief is what keeps her standing.
TIAMAT-KING_HASSANS_HORN.title: King Hassan's Horn
TIAMAT-KING_HASSANS_HORN.description: #At the start of combat, gain Guts: the first time you would die, revive at 1 HP and spawn 3 Laḫmu.
TIAMAT-KING_HASSANS_HORN.flavor: Only by granting her death can she be felled — so she answers death with more children.
